518 P4A P4A_BED_RAILS (P4A) Full Bed Rails CHAR 1 Special treatments and procedures: devices and restraints - full bed rails on all sides of bed. 0 = Not Used, 1 = Used less than daily, 2 = Used daily, "-" = Unknown.
519 P4B P4B_OTH_RAILS (P4B) Other Side Rails CHAR 1 Special treatments and procedures: devices and restraints - other types of side rails used. 0 = Not Used, 1 = Used less than daily, 2 = Used daily, "-" = Unknown.
